bead.title: Stage 3.7: update Go //go:embed to serve SvelteKit build
bead.description: Update cli/internal/server/embed.go to `//go:embed all:frontend/build`. Update static file handler to serve frontend/build/*. Use SvelteKit adapter-static with `fallback: 'index.html'` so deep links resolve to the SPA shell (SvelteKit client handles routing). See docs/plan-svelte-migration.md Stage 3 bead #33.
bead.acceptance: (1) `make build` embeds the SvelteKit build/ output. (2) MANUAL: `./cli/build/ddx server` running locally serves the layout at http://127.0.0.1:7743/. (3) MANUAL: loading http://127.0.0.1:7743/nodes/abc/projects/def/beads directly returns the SvelteKit shell (browser dev tools show index.html returned, then Svelte router renders the page).
